zh.lifeSummary: 當John Corbet於1298年3月25日出生在英國史洛普爾時，他的父親Peter Corbet69歲，母親Alice de Orreby47歲。他於大約1321年與Mrs John Corbet在英國英格蘭史洛普爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1347年在英國爾麗頓 白 內斯頓享年49歲。

nameMeanings.name: Corbet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: Walter Corbet, a royal knight in 12th-century Scotland, was the first of that name in that kingdom. His 13th-century descendants were major landholders in the Borders, and in the 14th century they acquired lands in the North of Scotland.

variants.name: Corbett
meanings: English (West Midlands, of Norman origin): nickname from Old French corbet ‘raven’, probably denoting someone with dark hair or a dark complexion.

History: This is the name of a family descended from Hugh Corbet, a Norman baron who settled in Shropshire following the Norman Conquest. One of his descendants, Sir Richard Corbet, was granted land near Shrewsbury in 1223; since the 13th century, this place has been known as Moreton Corbet. The name was taken from Shropshire to Scotland in the 12th century and to northern Ireland in the 17th century, and thence to North America by at least one group of bearers of the name.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John Corbet was born on 25 March 1298, in Shropshire, England, his father, Peter Corbet, was 69 and his mother, Alice de Orreby, was 47. He married Mrs John Corbet about 1321, in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1347, in Leighton by Neston, Cheshire, England, at the age of 49.

ko.lifeSummary: John Corbet(이)가 1298년 3월 25일 영국 슈럽실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Peter Corbet(은)는 69세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Orreby(은)는 47세였다. 그는 대략 1321년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에서 Mrs John Corbet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1347년 영국 체실르 레이턴 비 네스턴에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.
